subcodes.first_line: O ye steadfast ones, O ye firm ones! The Sun of the Covenant hath cast its rays upon East and West, and Orient and Occident are illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان ای راسخان آفتاب عهد بر شرق و غرب تجلی نموده خاور و باختر روشن گشته
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @predictions and prophecies, @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
